overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a sci-fi flight simulation game, navigating a spacecraft through a dense foggy nebula or atmospheric environment. The player flies past large industrial space structures and debris fields with low visibility, illuminated only by the ship's yellow HUD and distant marker lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense fog nebula with scattered debris

events.description: large derelict station structure becomes visible through the fog ahead
slight bank to the right while approaching the structure

agents.ego_description: piloting the spacecraft forward through dense fog, scanning for obstacles on the HUD

entered.detail: dark metal cockpit interior framing the view with yellow holographic displays
massive industrial space station or ship wreck with angular metal surfaces
glowing blue navigation beacons visible through the fog
suspended ice crystals or debris particles drifting in the fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person cockpit view flying through dense fog. A massive derelict structure gradually materializes ahead while blue marker lights glow in the distance. The ship drifts slightly right as it approaches the wreck, with debris particles floating past the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: close proximity to large space wreck

events.description: banking left to navigate around the large derelict structure
visibility decreases entering thicker fog bank after passing the structure

agents.ego_description: maneuvering around the large structure while maintaining distance from debris fields

entered.detail: cluster of smaller industrial platforms visible in the far distance
pulsing red hazard lights on a nearby structure

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft banks left around the massive derelict structure, which recedes behind the ship. Red warning lights appear on the left side as the vessel enters a thicker fog bank. The blue markers shift closer as the ship continues its trajectory through the debris field.

events.description: visibility improves slightly revealing scattered wreckage ahead
slight descent as approaching lower altitude fog layer

agents.ego_description: continuing forward flight through variable density fog, monitoring sensors for obstacles

entered.detail: twisted metal fragments and broken hull sections drifting in space
faint blue glow suggesting distant energy source or engine trail

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the ship flying through open fog with scattered floating wreckage visible on the left. The distant platforms and red lights fade from view as a blue energy signature appears on the right. Visibility fluctuates as the vessel descends slightly into a denser fog layer toward the end of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person cockpit perspective navigating through a dense, foggy void that shifts from a derelict industrial wreck to an open field of floating debris. It begins by gliding through thick fog as a massive derelict structure and distant blue marker lights gradually materialize ahead, with debris particles drifting past the canopy. As the spacecraft banks left to bypass the wreck, the structure recedes and the environment grows more oppressive, introducing red warning lights as the vessel enters a thicker fog bank. The scene then opens into a wider expanse of fog with scattered wreckage floating to the left, while the red lights fade and a blue energy signature emerges on the right. Finally, the ship descends slightly, causing visibility to fluctuate as it sinks into a denser layer of fog.
